The '''''Kingdom of Dreams''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] capable of interdimensional travel. [[Cody Sunn-Childe]] and his followers retreated to an [[Psychic plane|extra-dimensional realm]] in the ''Kingdom''. Although the starship also existed in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]], Sunn-Childe claimed that everything in his [[City of Dreams]] was composed not of matter, but of "psychic energy."

==Characteristics==
[[File:Dreams.jpg|thumb|left|Fantastic beasts in the jungle, actually psychic projections of Cody Sunn-Childe]]

The ''Kingdom of Dreams'' consisted of a flat superstructure resembling an island and the dome-covered [[City of Dreams]] constructed on top, surrounded by a fantastic jungle.<ref name="SW46" /> The ship could travel between dimensions, allowing Sunn-Childe and his followers to escape the ravages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> It was destroyed by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Plikk]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Nizzon]]'s fleet of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] by means of [[Hyper-drive anti-matter pod|hyper-drive pod]] energy channeled through [[Laser/Legends|laser]] batteries; all its residents were killed, including Sunn-Childe.<ref name="SW46" />
